column16:
This rule captures and documents the result from external vaccine history for vaccines such as Rotarix, Bexsero, Infanrix Hexa, Prevenar 13, and Menjugate into a DTA for charting or related result purposes.

Evoke Section

The rule is triggered by external vaccine history records where:
column17:
• The application used is PowerChart.
  • Orders for vaccines are evaluated, including Rotarix (Rotavirus vaccine), Bexsero (Meningococcal group B vaccine), Infanrix Hexa, Prevenar 13, and Menjugate.
  • Order statuses can be Ordered, Deleted, Discontinued, Cancelled, or Void.

Logic Section

The rule evaluates incoming order events and processes external vaccine history for the following vaccines:
column19:
Captures the external history if the order status is Ordered.
  • Bexsero (Meningococcal group B vaccine):
column20:
Captures the external history if the order status is Ordered.
  • Infanrix Hexa:
column21:
Captures the external history if the order status is Ordered.
  • Prevenar 13:
column22:
Captures the external history if the order status is Ordered.
  • Menjugate (Meningococcal group C vaccine):
column23:
Captures the external history if the order status is Ordered.
  • Void/Cancelled/Discontinued:
column24:
For all the vaccines listed, the rule captures and processes the Void, Cancel, Cancel/DC, and Discontinue actions.

Action Section

Based on the Logic Section, the rule documents the appropriate external vaccine history result for each vaccine:
column26:
Creates a verified result with the associated external history date.
  • Bexsero:
column27:
Creates a verified result with the associated external history date.
  • Infanrix Hexa:
column28:
Creates a verified result with the associated external history date.
  • Prevenar 13:
column29:
Creates a verified result with the associated external history date.
  • Menjugate:
column30:
Creates a verified result with the associated external history date.
  • Void/Cancelled:
column31:
For voided or cancelled vaccines, the rule logs an In Error result and updates the appropriate clinical event ID.

,EKM Rules,NICU Vaccine - Rotarix - PHA_NICU_VAC_ROTA_FD_V2,Test in Prod,Meds Team,,2024-07-08T23:00:00Z,"

File Name:
column6:
This rule evaluates and documents the result for the Rotavirus vaccine (Rotarix), based on PowerChart actions.

Evoke Section

The rule is triggered when a result is received for the Rotavirus vaccine (Rotarix). The following result statuses are evaluated:
column7:
• Auth (Verified)
  • Not Done
  • Modified
  • In Error

Logic Section

The rule processes the vaccine result and determines the appropriate action based on the detected status:
column10:
Records that the vaccine administration was not completed.
  • Modified:
column11:
Identifies and updates the modified clinical event.
  • In Error:
column12:
Logs an error for the administration of the vaccine.

Action Section

Based on the status from the Logic Section, the rule documents the appropriate result for Rotarix:
column14:
Logs the verified result without sending it back to Discern Expert and does not inherit dynamic labels.
  • Not Done:
column15:
Records the vaccine as not administered, without sending the event back to Discern Expert.
  • Modified:
column16:
Updates the modified result with the appropriate note.
  • In Error:
column17:
Logs the result with an error and prevents the event from being sent back to Discern Expert.
",,,,,,,,,FALSE,,Brian.Kehoe@hse.ie,2024-10-17T16:20:52Z,"View Entries",0,[],(2) Normal,,2024-07-09T13:34:40Z,Brian.Kehoe@hse.ie,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,

column6:
This rule evaluates and documents the result for the Meningococcal group B vaccine (Bexsero) based on PowerChart actions.

Evoke Section

The rule triggers when a result is received for the Meningococcal group B vaccine. The following result statuses are evaluated:
column7:
• Auth (Verified)
  • Not Done
  • Modified

Logic Section

  • In Error:
column13:
Logs an error for the vaccine administration.
